title: ctenitis decurrenti-pinnata
intro: Ctenitis decurrenti-pinnata, also known as the creeping fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis decurrenti-pinnata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Ctenitis decurrenti-pinnata can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
